name: beeclaw
description: BeeClaw (BeeWorld) - 群体智能仿真引擎，由完整 LLM Agent 组成的持续演化的平行世界

scripts.clean: find packages -maxdepth 3 -name dist -type d -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find packages -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'Clean done'
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/agent-runtime -w packages/social-graph -w packages/consensus && npm run build -w packages/event-bus && npm run build -w packages/event-ingestion -w packages/world-engine && npm run build -w packages/cli -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/dashboard

author: BeeQueen 集团
